title: alectryon oleifolius
intro: Alectryon oleifolius, also known as the Bird Lime Tree or Birdlime Tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. The plant is native to Southeast Asia and has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Alectryon oleifolius include treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as aiding in digestion and reducing pain. Alectryon oleifolius can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for its medicinal use, and it is also used in traditional medicine to make ointments and salves for topical application.
